subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth, and verily it is a revelation from God, the Lord of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق و انه تنزیل من لدی الله رب العالمین
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @law of fasting, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @call to action
